title: Conceptualisations of critical thinking in academic writing at a master’s level
author: Andrew Gordon Drybrough
abstract: Critical thinking is often considered to involve a set of skills required by graduates of higher educational institutions in the UK. However, the conceptualisation of critical thinking by university tutors varies across disciplines and is not always particularly clear. In a UK higher educational context where proportionally increasing numbers of postgraduate students are international, often from …
relevance: 这篇论文探讨高等教育中批判性思维的概念化及其在不同学科、不同文化背景学生间的理解差异，与用户的研究有一定间接关联。首先，它涉及学术评估标准（如导师对"批判性思维"的界定）如何因学科和文化而异，这与方向一中评估中的认识论不公正（epistemic injustice）相呼应——当国际学生的批判性思维传统不被认可或被边缘化时，可能构成一种知识权力的不对等。其次，论文关注不同教育传统背景的学生与导师之间的理解落差，这

title: Conceptualisations of critical thinking in academic writing at a master’s level
author: Andrew Gordon Drybrough
abstract: Critical thinking is often considered to involve a set of skills required by graduates of higher educational institutions in the UK. However, the conceptualisation of critical thinking by university tutors varies across disciplines and is not always particularly clear. In a UK higher educational context where proportionally increasing numbers of postgraduate students are international, often from …
relevance: 该论文聚焦高等教育中批判性思维的概念化及其跨文化理解差异，与用户的研究方向存在间接关联。首先，它涉及学术评估中的认知标准与权力问题——导师对"批判性思维"的模糊定义可能导致国际学生在评估中处于不利地位，这与方向一中epistemic injustice（认知不公正）的关切相呼应，即谁的知识方式被认可、谁的被边缘化。其次，国际学生与本土导师之间对批判性思维理解的错位，也隐含着语言权力和制度性话语霸权的议题

title: Conceptualisations of critical thinking in academic writing at a master’s level
author: Andrew Gordon Drybrough
abstract: Critical thinking is often considered to involve a set of skills required by graduates of higher educational institutions in the UK. However, the conceptualisation of critical thinking by university tutors varies across disciplines and is not always particularly clear. In a UK higher educational context where proportionally increasing numbers of postgraduate students are international, often from …
relevance: 这篇论文探讨高等教育中批判性思维的概念化及其在不同学科、不同文化背景学生间的理解差异。它与方向一有一定关联：批判性思维的界定涉及学术评估标准中的知识权力问题，不同教育传统的学生面对英国学术规范时可能遭遇认识论不公正（epistemic injustice），即其原有的思维方式和知识传统被边缘化或贬低。此外，导师对批判性思维的不同概念化也可通过批评话语分析（CDA）的视角来审视学术话语中隐含的权力关系与制度期待。

title: Marked and unmarked translanguaging in accelerated, mainstream, and sheltered English classrooms
author: Ingrid Rodrick Beiler
abstract: Abstract Translanguaging has gained prominence as a way to understand multilingual practices and draw on these in additional language teaching, but questions remain regarding its application in various educational contexts. This study investigates the significance of translanguaging across instructional settings by comparing discourses of markedness in accelerated, mainstream, and sheltered classe…
relevance: 该研究聚焦于不同英语课堂教学环境中translanguaging的"有标记"与"无标记"使用，直接关联方向二中translanguaging与课堂互动的核心议题，探讨多语实践如何在不同教学情境中被中介和协商。同时，研究比较了加速班、主流班与庇护班中语言多数群体与少数群体学生的差异化经验，涉及语言权力与制度性分层，这与方向一中语言权力及批评话语分析（CDA）的关注点相呼应，也触及方向三中同一教师在不同制度化课堂设置下

title: Challenges in decolonizing linguistics: the politics of enregisterment and the divergent uptakes of translingualism
author: Suresh Canagarajah
abstract: Abstract This article traces the roots of translingualism in the Global South, with particular relevance to the author’s South Asian heritage. After narrating his attempts to practice this orientation in his research and scholarship, the author analyzes the problematic ways in which translingualism is appropriated in the academic, economic, and political contexts in Global North. Employing the con…
relevance: 本文探讨了translingualism在全球南方的根源及其在全球北方被挪用的权力政治问题，与方向二中translanguaging的理论基础和意识形态批判密切相关，促使研究者反思超语实践在课堂互动研究中的理论预设与权力关系。同时，文章运用enregisterment和解殖民视角对学术话语进行批判性分析，与方向一中CDA及知识不公正（epistemic injustice）的关切高度契合，提醒研究者关注语言评估与教学实践中隐含的殖民性权力结构。此外，其对制度性话语挪用的批判也

title: 4 Research Methods: Quantitative and Qualitative Approaches
author: Durk Gorter, Jasone Cenoz
abstract: The improvement and expansion of higher education have been priorities of our national development in Kenya.Within a span of thirty five years since independence, we have witnessed the creation of five public universities.Several private universities have also been established.In our national universities, more professional programmes have been developed at both undergraduate and postgraduate leve…
relevance: 这篇文献是一篇关于肯尼亚高等教育发展与研究方法概述的章节/论文，与你今日主线"Chinese-English translanguaging in digital third spaces and identity work"以及活跃稿件几乎没有直接关联。它既不涉及translanguaging理论、数字平台话语分析，也不触及身份建构或多模态资源的讨论。

title: Investigating writing difficulties in essay writing: Tertiary students’ perspectives
author: Suhaimah Bulqiyah, Moh. Arif Mahbub, Dyah Ayu Nugraheni
abstract: This study is primarily designed for investigating the tertiary students’ perspectives on the writing difficulties of essays. This study was conducted in explanatory research in which quantitative and qualitative data were obtained from the web-based questionnaire and semi-structured interview, then analyzed separately. 21 undergraduate students have enrolled in the survey and 6 of them were invit…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"academic writing, feedback, and revision"在话题层面有交集——都关注学术写作困难——但其研究层次停留在小规模描述性调查（21人问卷+6人访谈），缺乏理论驱动和可辩护的方法链，与你活跃稿件中任何一篇的深度和批判取向均不匹配。它更适合作为反面参照而非正面借鉴：你可以观察它在文献综述中如何把"writing difficulties"简单分类却未建立分析张力，以此提醒自己在组织文献综述时要让分类服务于论证缺口，而非仅仅罗列已有发现。最值得留意的恰恰是它在问题意识表达上的不足——研究问题宽泛且缺少理论锚点，正好可以用来反思你长期写作目标中"把研究问题写得尖锐但不过度夸张"这一条该怎样落地。

title: Translanguaging as pedagogy in a Chinese complementary school in the UK
author: Yan Chu
journal: White Rose eTheses Online (University of Leeds, The University of Sheffield, University of York)
abstract: This study investigates language teachers’ translanguaging practices in three Mandarin classes of a Chinese complementary school in the UK. It draws on the ideas of translanguaging as individuals’ deployment of their full linguistic repertoires, translanguaging as multimodal system, translanguaging as bilingual pedagogy, translanguaging as the embodiment of users’ sociocultural background, and exa…
relevance: 这篇论文与你今日主线"CSL peer interaction / MICM"的关联属于外围情境层而非核心机制层：它聚焦的是英国中文补习学校中教师的translanguaging教学实践，虽然同处CSL/CHL教学生态，但其分析单位是教师课堂语言选择及社会文化动因，并未涉及学习者之间的peer interaction、meaning negotiation或LRE编码，因此与你稿件中需要论证的MICM互动机制没有直接对话点。
